beats.what: A man in a grey shirt gestures while talking to his friends.
The group laughs together while sitting at a rooftop table.
The man in the black shirt listens and smiles at the group.
The woman in the blue shirt laughs during the conversation.

formal.text: A man in a grey shirt gestures during a discussion.
The group engages in collective laughter at a rooftop table.
A man in a black shirt observes the group.
A woman in a blue shirt participates in the laughter.

sarcastic.text: Riveting monologue unfolding on the rooftop.
Another soul lost to the sheer brilliance.
Peak comedy has clearly been achieved.

humorous_tech.text: Explaining why the feature flag is actually a lifestyle choice.
The team reacts to the massive technical debt.
Observing the feature flag impact in real-time.
Laughter ensues as the production environment stays stable.

humorous_non_tech.text: He's clearly telling the world's most dramatic story.
And everyone is absolutely buying it.
Even the guy in black is impressed.
The drama is hitting all the right notes.
